case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION VS. KENNETH PRATHER II

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILATION, REPRESENTED BY TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH PRATHER II IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
